store_info.name: Moringa Market
store_info.description: A curated shop built by a Moringa student — simple, focused, and test-ready.

products.name: Kenyan Arabica
products.description: Bright, fruity notes — light roast. A morning favourite.

products.name: House Espresso
products.description: Dark, chocolatey — perfect for espresso shots.

products.name: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe
products.description: Floral and tea-like with citrus highlights.

products.name: Colombian Supremo
products.description: Balanced body, caramel sweetness — crowd pleaser.

products.name: Decaf Sunrise
products.description: Smooth decaf with warm nutty tones.

products.name: Single-Origin Sumatra
products.description: Earthy, herbal notes with a heavy body.

products.name: Vanilla Bean Roast
products.description: Gentle vanilla sweetness, medium roast — dessert-friendly.

products.name: Cold Brew Blend
products.description: Low-acidity blend crafted for smooth cold brew.
